data.name: AlreadyExists
data.value: Already Exists

data.name: DeleteCategoryWithMenuItems
data.value: Category cannot be deleted because it has menu items

data.value: Invalid

data.name: NotFound
data.value: Not Found

data.name: OrderAssignedToYou
data.value: New Delivery Has Assigned To You !

data.name: Required
data.value: this field is required

data.name: Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized

data.name: EmailIsNotConfirmed
data.value: Email is not confirmed

data.name: ErrorHappend
data.value: An unexpected error occurred

data.name: Failed
data.value: Failed

data.name: ConfirmEmail
data.value: Confirm your email

data.name: Success
data.value: Success

data.name: Error
data.value: Error

data.name: MenuItemIngredient
data.value: MenuItem must have at least one ingredient

data.name: OrderAlreadyPaid
data.value: Order already paid

data.name: FailedToUpdate
data.value: Failed to update

data.name: FailedToDelete
data.value: Failed to delete

data.name: FailedOrders
data.value: Failed to retrieve orders

data.name: TableCapacityInvalid
data.value: Capcity must be between 1 and 20

data.name: OccupiedTable
data.value: Cannot delete an occupied table

data.name: TableBranch
data.value: Table number already exists in this branch

data.name: FreeTable
data.value: Cannot free table with active orders

data.name: CompletedTableOrder
data.value: Table order is already completed

data.name: FailedUpdatingStatus
data.value: Failed to update order status

data.name: FailedRetrieveCreatedOrder
data.value: Failed to retrieve created order

data.name: DeleteReceivedOrder
data.value: Cannot delete a received order

data.name: RemoveAllOrderItems
data.value: Cannot remove all items from order. Consider cancelling the order instead.

data.name: AlreadyOccupiedTable
data.value: The table is already occupied

data.name: TableNotInBranch
data.value: This table doesn't belong to this branch

data.name: DuplicateMenuItems
data.value: Duplicate MenuItems are not allowed

data.name: FailedAddingOrder
data.value: Failed to add items to order

data.name: TableID
data.value: TableId is required for DineIn orders

data.name: DeliveryAddress
data.value: DeliveryAddress is required for Delivery orders

data.name: OrderItem
data.value: Order must have at least one item

data.name: BasketNotFound
data.value: Basket with id {0} is not found

data.name: BasketOperationFailed
data.value: Operation failed for basket with id {0}

data.name: BranchNotFound
data.value: Branch with id {0} is not found

data.name: DeleteInActiveBranch
data.value: Branch with id {0} cannot be deleted because it is inactive

data.name: DeleteBranchWithActiveOrders
data.value: Branch with id {0} cannot be deleted because it has active orders

data.name: BranchStockNotFound
data.value: Branch stock with id {0} is not found

data.name: CategoryNotFound
data.value: Category with id {0} is not found

data.name: CategoryAlreadyExists
data.value: Category "{0}" already exists

data.name: CategoryNameRequired
data.value: Category name is required

data.name: DeleteCategoryWithMenuItems
data.value: Category with id {0} cannot be deleted because it has menu items

data.name: DeliveryNotFound
data.value: Delivery with id {0} is not found

data.name: OrderNotFound
data.value: Order with id {0} is not found

data.name: DriverNotFound
data.value: Driver with id {0} is not found

data.name: InvalidDriverRole
data.value: User with id {0} is not a driver

data.name: UnauthorizedDriver
data.value: You are not authorized to update this delivery

data.name: InvalidOrderType
data.value: Order with id {0} is not a delivery order

data.name: OrderAssignedToDelivery
data.value: Order with id {0} is already assigned to a driver

data.name: InvalidStatusValue
data.value: Status value "{0}" is not valid

data.name: InvalidStatusTransition
data.value: Cannot transition from "{0}" to "{1}"

data.name: OrderIsNotReadyYet
data.value: Order with id {0} is not ready yet

data.name: EmailNotConfirmed
data.value: Email "{0}" is not confirmed

data.name: EmailAlreadyExists
data.value: Email "{0}" is already registered

data.name: RegistrationFailed
data.value: Registration failed: {0}

data.name: AuthError
data.value: An error occurred during authentication

data.name: IngredientNotFound
data.value: Ingredient with id {0} is not found

data.name: IngredientAlreadyExists
data.value: Ingredient "{0}" already exists

data.name: IngredientNameRequired
data.value: Ingredient name is required

data.name: KitchenTicketNotFound
data.value: Kitchen ticket with id {0} is not found

data.name: MenuItemNotFound
data.value: Menu item with id {0} is not found

data.name: MenuItemNoIngredients
data.value: At least one ingredient is required for a menu item

data.name: InvalidIngredientIds
data.value: The following ingredient ids are invalid: {0}

data.name: ImageUploadFailed
data.value: Image upload failed

data.name: DuplicateIngredient
data.value: Duplicate ingredients are not allowed

data.name: NotificationNotFound
data.value: Notification with id {0} is not found

data.name: InvalidPaymentMethod
data.value: Invalid payment method: {0}

data.name: InsufficientStock
data.value: Insufficient stock. {0}

data.name: PaymentNotFound
data.value: Payment record for order {0} is not found

data.name: CancelReceivedOrderOnly
data.value: Only orders with status 'Received' can be cancelled

data.name: OrderItemNotFound
data.value: Order item with id {0} is not found

data.name: IngredientNotInBranch
data.value: Ingredient with id {0} is not available in this branch

data.name: UnauthorizedOrder
data.value: You are not authorized to pay for this order

data.name: RecipeNotFound
data.value: Recipe with id {0} was not found

data.name: RecipeAlreadyExists
data.value: A recipe for MenuItem {0} and Ingredient {1} already exists

data.name: RecipeAddFailed
data.value: Failed to add the recipe

data.name: RecipeUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update recipe with id {0}

data.name: RecipeDeleteFailed
